_comment: Class identity tables consumed by PropertyKeyResolver. Edit this file to retune classes without recompiling. 'classOrder' is the canonical class index used by skill 'charclass' columns (0..7). 'idRanges' maps a Skills.txt skill-id range to a class code, used by descfunc 27 (randclassskill) when a numeric parameter is supplied. The 'code' values must exist as keys in CharStats.txt (3-letter charstats codes).
